reasoning: Candidate health bar (right, 4x) uses a soft warm rose-pink on parchment — clearly not grimdark, cold, or edgy. Passes the basic warmth and friendliness bar. Net: warm enough to avoid fail, but too bare-bones to confidently pass as distinctively fairy-tale.
